translations.en: a tall, delicate looking female. Her smile puts you at ease.*
translations.zh: 一位高挑、外貌纖弱的女子，她的笑容令汝頓感自在。*

translations.en: "Hello $G, welcome to my home."
translations.zh: 「你好，$G，歡迎來到我家。」

translations.en: Her eyes are as blue as the ocean and her movements as rythmic as the tide.
translations.zh: 她的雙眼藍如大海，舉止韻律如潮汐般悠揚。

translations.en: "I recognize you from before." She winks at you.
translations.zh: 「我認得汝。」她向汝眨眨眼。

translations.en: "What can I do for you?"
translations.zh: 「有何需要效勞？」

translations.en: "My father chose an ancient word for my name."
translations.zh: 「我的名字是父親從一個古老詞語中選來的。」

translations.en: "It means the cool breeze after a storm has passed. @Marney."
translations.zh: 「意為風暴過後的清涼微風。@瑪妮。」

translations.en: "I look after the @dock."
translations.zh: 「在下看管@碼頭。」

translations.en: "Oh, you're probably wanting a skiff to get out to old Horance's island."
translations.zh: 「哦，汝大概是想要一艘小船去老霍蘭斯的島上吧。」

translations.en: "Well, we have none for sale, but feel free to borrow the one at the dock."
translations.zh: 「我們沒有船出售，但碼頭上的那艘可以借用。」

translations.en: "Be sure to return it, though!"
translations.zh: 「但記得歸還！」

translations.en: "It is in a @poem my mother wrote to him when they first met."
translations.zh: 「那在我母親與父親初見時為他所寫的@詩中。」

translations.en: She grabs a @locket that hangs around her neck and opens it.
translations.zh: 她取下頸上掛著的@小圓盒，將它打開。

translations.en: Inside is a folded piece of cloth with words printed on it. She begins to read.
translations.zh: 裡面有一塊折疊的布片，上面印有文字。她開始朗讀。

translations.en: "At first we met and dark clouds gathered, the thunder sounding your approach."
translations.zh: 「初見之時，烏雲密佈，雷聲宣示著汝的到來。」

translations.en: "Then comes the storm of our hearts pounding and in the end the marney's touch."
translations.zh: 「而後心跳如雷暴湧，最終是那微風般的撫觸。」

translations.en: "Certainly you can look at it." She hands the tiny cloth to you.
translations.zh: 「當然可以看看。」她將那塊小布片遞給汝。

translations.en: Looking at it, you discover that she has read only the first verse of the poem.
translations.zh: 細看之下，汝發現她只朗讀了第一節詩。

translations.en: The second reads, "If I should leave and you are lonely,
translations.zh: 第二節寫道：「若吾已然離去而汝形單影隻，

translations.en: Remember where my love is kept:
translations.zh: 記住吾愛所藏之處：

translations.en: Inside a @basket made of promise,
translations.zh: 在承諾所編之@籃中，

translations.en: You'll find my dreams of us have slept."
translations.zh: 汝將尋得吾對你我之夢，靜眠其中。」

translations.en: "A basket? I have one in my hope chest. Feel free to look for yourself."
translations.zh: 「籃子？我的嫁妝箱裡有一個，汝盡可自行查看。」

translations.en: "My mother gave me this just before she was taken by those evil men."
translations.zh: 「這是我母親在被那些惡人擄走前交給我的。」

translations.en: "My mother told me to give it to father when he returned from the @sea."
translations.zh: 「我母親叫我等父親從@大海歸來時交給他。」

translations.en: "Yorl gave it back to me after he was @killed.
translations.zh: 「尤爾在父親@被殺後，將它還給了我。

translations.en: "My father had gone out to help @Yorl bring in the catch that afternoon."
translations.zh: 「那天下午，父親出門去幫@尤爾搬運漁獲。」

translations.en: "I am sorry for our town. You see, my father was the caretaker of the rune stone."
translations.zh: 「為吾鎮感到抱歉。汝知道，我父親是符文石的保管人。」

translations.en: "After he died, we had no way of finding out where he put it."
translations.zh: 「他過世後，我們便無從得知他將符文石藏於何處。」

translations.en: She bows her head a moment and with a shaky voice begins to speak.
translations.zh: 她低下頭，用顫抖的聲音開口說道。

translations.en: "It is something I care not to talk about. His memory brings only sadness to me."
translations.zh: 「此事我不願多談。他的記憶帶給我的只有悲傷。」

translations.en: "My father? He was a brave man and very strong."
translations.zh: 「我父親？他是個勇敢且堅強的人。」

translations.en: "That he died in such a violent way was so wrong."
translations.zh: 「他以如此慘烈的方式死去，實在太不應該。」

translations.en: "But I am sure there is a reason for it."
translations.zh: 「但我確信一切皆有其緣由。」

translations.en: Her blue eyes glisten with new-formed tears.
translations.zh: 她那雙藍色眼眸中新聚了淚光。

translations.en: She rubs her nose with the knuckle of her hand.
translations.zh: 她用手指關節輕揉了揉鼻子。

translations.en: "I can not see why those beasts would kill him, but perhaps it was just unfortunate."
translations.zh: 「我不明白那些惡獸為何要殺他，但或許只是不幸所致。」

translations.en: "Still, I can't see why he was at the inn that late."
translations.zh: 「然而，我仍不解他為何那麼晚還在旅店附近。」

translations.en: "Had he been drinking, @Yorl would have been with him."
translations.zh: 「若他在喝酒，@尤爾必然也在他身旁。」

translations.en: "Oh, Yorl." She smiles to herself. "He and father were never apart."
translations.zh: 「哦，尤爾。」她自顧微笑。「他和父親形影不離。」

translations.en: "After my mother was kidnapped, Yorl helped my father get back on his feet."
translations.zh: 「我母親被擄走後，尤爾幫助父親振作起來。」

translations.en: "They were always together." Her gaze returns to you.
translations.zh: 「他們總是在一起。」她的目光回到汝身上。

translations.en: "If my @father had been drinking at the @inn, Yorl would have been there."
translations.zh: 「若我@父親在@旅店喝酒，尤爾必然也在。」

translations.en: "My father and Yorl would go there after a good catch."
translations.zh: 「父親和尤爾每逢漁獲豐收後便會去那裡。」

translations.en: "@Gideon had been a friend of theirs since youth."
translations.zh: 「@吉迪恩自年輕起便是他們的好友。」

translations.en: "The three would would drink and reminisce together."
translations.zh: 「三人常在一起暢飲、憶往事。」

translations.en: She looks at you and swallows. "I cannot talk about these creatures."
translations.zh: 她看著汝，嚥了嚥口水。「我無法談論那些生靈。」

translations.en: "I believe he has done all he can for me."
translations.zh: 「我相信他已為我盡力而為。」

translations.en: "When my father was murdered, he took charge to find the gargoyles."
translations.zh: 「父親遇害時，他主動出面追查魔像族。」

translations.en: "None were found though."
translations.zh: 「然而毫無所獲。」

translations.en: Her eyes brighten at the mention of his name. "He is a very handsome man."
translations.zh: 一提到他的名字，她的眼睛便亮了起來。「他是個非常英俊的男子。」

translations.en: "I see him only occasionally when he comes into town."
translations.zh: 「我只是偶爾在他進城時才能見到他。」

translations.en: She looks absently out the window. "Yorl would never let me see him though."
translations.zh: 她茫然地望向窗外。「但尤爾從不讓我去找他。」

translations.en: "He and his wife are very kind to me. They have taught me so much about how to treat others."
translations.zh: 「他和他的妻子對我非常好，教導了我許多待人處世之道。」

translations.en: "He is a sweet little man. He brought me wine on my sixteenth birthday."
translations.zh: 「他是個可愛的小個子，在我十六歲生日時送了我葡萄酒。」

translations.en: "I'm quite fond of him."
translations.zh: 「我頗為喜歡他。」

translations.en: "She has done as much as she can to heal my wounded heart."
translations.zh: 「她盡其所能地撫慰我受傷的心。」

translations.en: "She bakes for me and we have long talks about almost everything."
translations.zh: 「她為我烤點心，我們聊幾乎所有的事情，暢談甚久。」

translations.en: "I wish I were as beautiful as she."
translations.zh: 「我多希望自己能像她一樣美麗。」

translations.en: "Ah, now, Horance is much wiser than most know."
translations.zh: 「啊，霍蘭斯其實比大多數人所知的還要睿智。」

translations.en: "He is also my mentor when it comes to poetry."
translations.zh: 「在詩歌方面，他也是我的引路人。」

translations.en: "He has a way of reminding me that I am too concerned with myself."
translations.zh: 「他有辦法提醒我，我過於自我中心了。」

translations.en: "It is a gentle way, but a firm reminder."
translations.zh: 「那是一種溫柔卻堅定的提醒。」

translations.en: "I saw him once when I was a little girl."
translations.zh: 「我小時候曾見過他一次。」

translations.en: "We had gone to his castle for a celebration and there he sat on a great white charger."
translations.zh: 「我們前往他的城堡參加慶典，他端坐在一匹雪白的駿馬上。」

translations.en: "What a sight he was."
translations.zh: 「那景象實在令人嘆為觀止。」

translations.en: "I am sorry that I wept. It is not your fault. Goodbye."
translations.zh: 「對不起，我失態了。這不是汝的錯，再見。」

translations.en: As you ask this, she begins to cry.Gathering her strength she looks at you. "Sorry?"
translations.zh: 汝一開口，她便哭了起來，強忍著看向汝。「對不起？」

translator_notes: 089 Marney: 昆頓之女，美麗憂傷。詩歌段落以古典中文詩體意譯。暗戀麥可。
